/usr/bin/c++  -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fPIC --target=arm64-apple-macosx -mmacosx-version-min=26.4 -w -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o
